lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਮੈ ਮੂਰਖ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੁਸਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: mere raam mai moorakh har raakh mere guseea |
lines.english: O my Lord, I am so foolish; save me, O my Lord God!

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕੀ ਉਪਮਾ ਤੁਝਹਿ ਵਡਈਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jan kee upamaa tujheh vaddeea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Your servant's praise is Your Own Glorious Greatness. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਰਸ ਮੀਠੇ ਮੁਖਿ ਲਗਹਿ ਜਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ras meetthe mukh lageh jaa har gun gaavai |
lines.english: Their mouths savor all the sweet delicacies when they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਦਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਆਨੰਦੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: mandar ghar aanand har har jas man bhaavai |
lines.english: Those whose minds are pleased by the Praises of the Lord, Har, Har, are joyful in the palaces of their own homes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨੁ ਪਰਵਾਰੁ ਸਧਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਇਕੀਹ ਕੁਲੀ ਸਭੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਛਡਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har jan paravaar sadhaar hai ikeeh kulee sabh jagat chhaddaavai |2|
lines.english: The Lord's humble servants are the saviors of their families; they save their families for twenty-one generations - they save the entire world! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਆ ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh keea so har keea har kee vaddiaaee |
lines.english: Whatever has been done, has been done by the Lord; it is the Glorious Greatness of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਲਹਾਇਦਾ ਆਪੇ ਵਰਤਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har bhagat bhanddaar lahaaeidaa aape varataaee |3|
lines.english: The Lord leads us to the treasure of devotional worship; He Himself bestows it. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਅ ਤੇਰੇ ਤੂੰ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਪੂਜ ਕਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har jeea tere toon varatadaa har pooj karaaee |
lines.english: O Lord, in Your creatures, You are pervading; You inspire them to worship You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਾ ਹਾਟਿ ਵਿਹਾਝਿਆ ਕਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: laalaa haatt vihaajhiaa kiaa tis chaturaaee |
lines.english: I am a slave, purchased in Your market; what clever tricks do I have?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਰਾਜਿ ਬਹਾਲੇ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਲਾਮੁ ਘਾਸੀ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਢਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: je raaj bahaale taa har gulaam ghaasee kau har naam kadtaaee |
lines.english: If the Lord were to set me upon a throne, I would still be His slave. If I were a grass-cutter, I would still chant the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਦਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੪॥੨॥੮॥੪੬॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har kaa daas hai har kee vaddiaaee |4|2|8|46|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is the slave of the Lord; contemplate the Glorious Greatness of the Lord||4||2||8||46||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree guaareree mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Gauree Bairaagan, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਸਾਣੀ ਕਿਰਸਾਣੁ ਕਰੇ ਲੋਚੈ ਜੀਉ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kirasaanee kirasaan kare lochai jeeo laae |
lines.english: The farmers love to work their farms;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੁ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਛਡਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tiau har jan har har jap kare har ant chhaddaae |1|
lines.english: In just the same way, the Lord's humble servants chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, and in the end, the Lord shall save them. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲੁ ਜੋਤੈ ਉਦਮੁ ਕਰੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਪੁਤੁ ਧੀ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hal jotai udam kare meraa put dhee khaae |
lines.english: they plow and work the fields, so that their sons and daughters may eat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਇ ਹਮ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur satigur sevaa har laae ham kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Lord, enjoin me to work and serve the Guru, the True Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਮੂਰਖ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਕੀਜੈ ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: mai moorakh kee gat keejai mere raam |
lines.english: I am foolish - save me, O my Lord!

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੈ ਤੁਰੇ ਸਉਦਾਗਰੀ ਸਉਦਾਗਰੁ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: lai ture saudaagaree saudaagar dhaavai |
lines.english: The traders buy horses, planning to trade them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਖਟੈ ਆਸਾ ਕਰੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਵਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: dhan khattai aasaa karai maaeaa mohu vadhaavai |
lines.english: They hope to earn wealth; their attachment to Maya increases.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਸੰਚੈ ਹਟਵਾਣੀਆ ਬਹਿ ਹਾਟਿ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bikh sanchai hattavaaneea beh haatt kamaae |
lines.english: The shop-keepers collect poison, sitting in their shops, carrying on their business.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਲਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਲਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tiau har jan har har bolataa har bol sukh paavai |2|
lines.english: In just the same way, the Lord's humble servants chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har; chanting the Lord's Name, they find peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਝੂਠੁ ਪਸਾਰਾ ਝੂਠ ਕਾ ਝੂਠੇ ਲਪਟਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: moh jhootth pasaaraa jhootth kaa jhootthe lapattaae |
lines.english: Their love is false, their displays are false, and they are engrossed in falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਜਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਖਰਚੁ ਲੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tiau har jan har dhan sanchiaa har kharach lai jaae |3|
lines.english: In just the same way, the Lord's humble servants gather the wealth of the Lord's Name; they take the Lord's Name as their supplies. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਤਰੈ ਜੋ ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee so jan tarai jo daasan daas |
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, the humble servants are carried across; they become the slaves of the Lord's slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਇ ਦੂਜੈ ਫਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: eihu maaeaa moh kuttanb hai bhaae doojai faas |
lines.english: This emotional attachment to Maya and family, and the love of duality, is a noose around the neck.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree bairaagan mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Gauree Bairaagan, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਿ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਗਾਸ ॥੪॥੩॥੯॥੪੭॥
lines.translit: jan naanak naam dhiaaeaa guramukh paragaas |4|3|9|47|
lines.english: Servant Nanak meditates on the Naam; the Gurmukh is enlightened. ||4||3||9||47||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਲਾਲਚੁ ਕਰੇ ਭਰਮੈ ਭਰਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nit dinas raat laalach kare bharamai bharamaaeaa |
lines.english: Continuously, day and night, they are gripped by greed and deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਗਾਰਿ ਫਿਰੈ ਵੇਗਾਰੀਆ ਸਿਰਿ ਭਾਰੁ ਉਠਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: vegaar firai vegaareea sir bhaar utthaaeaa |
lines.english: The slaves labor in slavery, carrying the loads upon their heads.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਜਨੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਘਰ ਕੈ ਕੰਮਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo gur kee jan sevaa kare so ghar kai kam har laaeaa |1|
lines.english: That humble being who serves the Guru is put to work by the Lord in His Home. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਤੋੜਿ ਬੰਧਨ ਮਾਇਆ ਘਰ ਕੈ ਕੰਮਿ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere raam torr bandhan maaeaa ghar kai kam laae |
lines.english: O my Lord, please break these bonds of Maya, and put me to work in Your Home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nit har gun gaavah har naam samaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I continuously sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord; I am absorbed in the Lord's Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਕਰੇ ਨਰਪਤਿ ਰਾਜੇ ਅਰਥਿ ਸਭ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nar praanee chaakaree kare narapat raaje arath sabh maaeaa |
lines.english: Mortal men work for kings, all for the sake of wealth and Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਫਲ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਕੀ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan sevaa safal satiguroo kee jit har har naam jap har sukh paaeaa |2|
lines.english: Blessed, rewarding and fruitful is the service of the True Guru; through it, I chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, and I have found peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੈ ਬੰਧੈ ਕੈ ਡਾਨਿ ਲੇਇ ਕੈ ਨਰਪਤਿ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kai bandhai kai ddaan lee kai narapat mar jaaeaa |
lines.english: But the king either imprisons them, or fines them, or else dies himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਸਉਦਾ ਸੂਦੁ ਕੀਚੈ ਬਹੁ ਭਾਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੈ ਤਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: nit saudaa sood keechai bahu bhaat kar maaeaa kai taaee |
lines.english: Everyday, people carry on their business, with all sorts of devices to earn interest, for the sake of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਝੀ ਗੁਰ ਸਿਉ ਕਰੇ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo gun saajhee gur siau kare nit nit sukh paaee |3|
lines.english: One who is worthy, becomes a partner with the Guru, and finds a lasting peace forever. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਲਾਹਾ ਦੇਇ ਤਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਮਨੇ ਤੋਟੈ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa laahaa dee taa sukh mane tottai mar jaaee |
lines.english: If they earn a profit, they are pleased, but their hearts are broken by losses.
